queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between negative checking account balances and increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Statistical impact of the absence of a checking account on credit risk drivers and default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of creditworthiness associated with savings account balances below 100 DM and reduced risk exposure.
